query: SELECT tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM anuncios WHERE producto LIKE '%OPIOIDES%' GROUP BY tipo ORDER BY tipo;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4MNpKPTYaa3AiSj.root --database NB4DzLv3DwSWij5HcQ7rQi --execute SELECT tipo, COUNT(*) as total FROM anuncios WHERE producto LIKE '%OPIOIDES%' GROUP BY tipo ORDER BY tipo;
